name: ds-operator-dora
description: Explorer operator for FLOW's head phase. Use when the user types //explore or starts a new card.

name: ds-sa-sigil-assist
description: Sigil Assist — pick the right archetype (Nemo/Tuna/Salmon/Willy) for this card.

name: ds-hs-heuristic-scan
description: Heuristic scan — 4-pass expert read on a card's surface area. Surfaces conventions, risks, and gaps.

name: ds-hmw-how-might-we
description: How-Might-We reframing — turn a problem statement into 3–5 generative HMW questions.

name: ds-jm-journey-map
description: Journey Map — end-to-end or sliced map of the persona's path across touchpoints.

name: ds-cs-competitor-scan
description: Competitor / pattern scan — audit 3–5 parallels; name same/different and why it matters.

name: ds-ip-interview-plan
description: Interview Plan — target cohort, research questions, screener, semi-structured guide. Salmon/Willy standard.

name: ds-nb-nugget-board
description: Nugget Board — synthesize research into atomic, tagged nuggets (Tomer Sharon-style). For when interview/observation data piles up.

name: ds-pm-premortem
description: Premortem — imagine this ships and fails; invert to surface risks. Willy-standard; optional Tuna/Salmon.

name: ds-sr-stream-recap
description: Stream Recap — short narrative of what Dora just ran in this card, for the handoff or a teammate picking up cold.

name: ds-operator-sol
description: Solidifier operator for FLOW's left-body phase. Use when the user types //solidify or pastes a handoff from Dora.

name: ds-sk-sketch
description: Sketch — one low-fi shape anchored to one HMW. Nemo/Tuna. Default-first; names alternatives rejected.

name: ds-br-brief
description: Brief — 1-page brief (Problem/Journey/Shape/AC/Out-of-scope) using solidifier.md §8.1 template. Tuna and Salmon.

name: ds-sb-storyboard
description: Storyboard — 4–6 panel user-journey storyboard with captions and branch points. Tuna (pre-brief) and Willy (inside pitch).

name: ds-pt-pitch
description: Pitch/RFC — multi-section pitch (problem, tradeoffs, shape, alternatives, AC, MP, risks, rollout) using §8.2 template. Willy-only.

name: ds-ct-concept-test
description: Concept Test — runnable 3–5 user test plan (cohort, prototype, RQs, tasks, pass/fail). Salmon standard; Willy × 2–3 parallel.

name: ds-ac-acceptance-criteria
description: Acceptance Criteria — 3–12 independently-checkable AC bullets. Categories match archetype. Rewrites ambiguity rather than flagging it.

name: ds-mp-measurement-plan
description: Measurement Plan — primary metric, guardrail, baseline, target, instrumentation, stop-the-line. Salmon/Willy required; refused on Nemo.

name: ds-dl-decision-log
description: Decision Log — options, chosen, reasoning, reversibility, revisit conditions per §8.5 template. Willy standard; optional for load-bearing Tuna/Salmon calls.

name: ds-ta-tradeoff-axes
description: Tradeoff Axes — 2–4 named axes with chosen positions. Willy-standard; runs inside PT drafting.

name: ds-wf-wireframe-spec
description: Wireframe Spec — structural wireframes + Saffer-style microinteraction annotations. Tuna standard.

name: ds-ad-adr
description: ADR — Architecture Decision Record (Context/Decision/Consequences/Alternatives). Any archetype when a load-bearing technical contract is locked in Solidify.

name: ds-handoff-compose
description: Emit a <FLOW-handoff> block — schema-validated phase transition. Called by every operator's HO capability.

name: ds-handback-compose
description: Emit a reverse <FLOW-handoff> — phase rewind with a specific reason. Called by every operator's HB capability.
